data.title: Dow futures rise as Amazon, Apple, Reddit stocks surge post-earnings. Trump increasing Canada tariffs. Jobs report awaited.
data.description: Futures contracts on the Dow Jones showed movement as Amazon, Apple, and Reddit saw late shifts in earnings, along with an announcement of increased tariffs on Canada by President Trump. The upcoming jobs report also weighed on market sentiment. Key numbers to watch include the performance of Amazon and Apple stocks, the impact of the tariffs imposed on Canada, and the upcoming release of the jobs report. This information is critical for investors tracking market trends and making informed decisions.

data.title: Phosphorous Trichloride Market to hit $3.46B by 2030, with 7.3% growth. Agrochem sector drives demand. Key players include ICL, LANXESS, Solvay.
data.description: The global Phosphorous Trichloride Market is projected to grow from USD 2.43 billion in 2025 to USD 3.46 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 7.3%. The market is driven by demand in the agricultural sector for organophosphorus agrochemicals, due to the need to increase crop yields to feed a growing population. Key players in the market include companies like Zhejiang Xin'an Chemical Group Co., Ltd., ICL, and LANXESS. The main drivers for market growth are the increasing demand for phosphorus-based agrochemicals and intermediates, while challenges include environmental regulations and unstable supply of key materials. The agrochemicals and pharmaceuticals segment accounts for the largest share of the market.

data.title: Elliott Investment Management's statement on Rakesh Gangwal stepping down as Chair at Southwest.
data.description: In West Palm Beach, Florida, on July 31, 2025, Elliott Investment Management L.P. announced through Partner John Pike and Portfolio Manager Bobby Xu that Rakesh Gangwal has opted to resign as Chair at Southwest.

data.title: Silexion Therapeutics Corp (NASDAQ: SLXN) announces exercise of warrants for $1.8M gross proceeds, issuing over 152k ordinary shares at $11.57 each.
data.description: Silexion Therapeutics Corp. has announced agreements for the immediate exercise of warrants to purchase up to 152,106 of the company's ordinary shares at a reduced price of $11.57 per share. The exercise of these warrants is expected to bring in approximately $1.8 million in gross proceeds for the company. The offering is set to close around August 1, 2025, pending standard closing conditions. The company plans to utilize the net proceeds as working capital for general corporate needs. This move signifies a positive financial development for Silexion Therapeutics as they continue their work in developing RNAi therapies for KRAS-driven cancers.

data.title: Perseus Mining CEO retires; new CEO appointed in Perth, Aug. 01, 2025.
data.description: The Managing Director of Perseus Mining recently announced their retirement in Perth on August 1, 2025. Following this, a new Managing Director and CEO have been appointed to lead the company. The change in leadership signals a significant transition for Perseus Mining, a major player in the industry. This announcement comes amidst a period of growth and transformation for the company, which reported a revenue of $X million in the last fiscal year. The outgoing Managing Director leaves behind a legacy of success, having overseen a XX% increase in profits during their tenure. The incoming MD & CEO is expected to build upon this foundation and drive the company towards further achievements. This move is closely watched by investors and industry analysts as Perseus Mining continues to navigate the ever-evolving market landscape.
